name: 群落生态
subject: biology
domain_name: 生态与生物多样性 / Ecology & Biodiversity / Ecology & Biodiversity
curriculum_points: HS-LS2-6: Evaluate claims, evidence, and reasoning that the complex interactions in ecosystems maintain relatively consistent numbers and types of organisms in stable conditions, but changing conditions may result in a new ecosystem.
HS-LS2-8: Evaluate evidence for the role of group behavior on individual and species’ chances to survive and reproduce.

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 生态瓶模拟：调节生产者/消费者/分解者数量，观察种群动态平衡
interactive_resources.description: Canvas/JS 生态系统种群动态模拟

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 生物过程动画：细胞/分子/生态系统等可视化模拟
interactive_resources.description: Canvas/JS 生物过程可视化模拟

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「群落生态」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：HS-LS2-6: Evaluate claims, evidence, and reasoning that the complex interactions in ecosystems maintain relatively consi…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：HS-LS2-8: Evaluate evidence for the role of group behavior on individual and spe… 对理解「群落生态」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
